title: erysimum macrospermum
intro: Erysimum macrospermum, also known as Bitter Candytuft, is a plant species within the Brassicaceae family, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and bitter taste. The plant's medicinal properties include its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve indigestion, and act as a natural diuretic. Erysimum macrospermum has been associated with various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions.
